recommendations.title: Black Coal, Thin Ice
recommendations.overview: Two former cops start investigating the series of murders that tanked their careers when the killings begin again.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn III: Urban Harvest
recommendations.overview: After a couple adopts a pair of orphaned brothers, it becomes alarmingly clear the boys are much more than they seem.

recommendations.title: Andhadhun
recommendations.overview: A series of mysterious events changes the life of a blind pianist who now must report a crime that was actually never witnessed by him.

recommendations.title: Tiger House
recommendations.overview: A young gymnast battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Talaash
recommendations.overview: A cop, investigating the mysterious death of a filmstar, meets a sex-worker, while he faces some personal problems psychologically. The mystery connects these people in a way, that ultimately changes their lives.

recommendations.title: Logorama
recommendations.overview: Two cops portrayed by Michelin Men chase an armed Ronald McDonald through the streets of a fictionalized, stylized city.
recommendations.director: Ludovic Houplain, François Alaux, Hervé de Crécy

recommendations.title: The Girl in the Fog
recommendations.overview: A gripping and chilling thriller that brings us to a hazy mountain village where an enigmatic detective is investigating the sudden disappearance of fifteen-year-old girl.

recommendations.title: Killing Ground
recommendations.overview: A couple's camping trip turns into a frightening ordeal when they stumble across the scene of a horrific crime.

recommendations.title: War of the Worlds: The Attack
recommendations.overview: Three young astronomers fight to survive a deadly Martian invasion.

recommendations.title: Angry Video Game Nerd: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Based on the hit web series of the same name, a disgruntled gamer must overcome his fear of the worst video game of all time in order to save his fans. Hilarity ensues as a simple road trip becomes an extravagant pursuit of the unexpected.
